# Question

Thank you for your interest in **Circuit Bench**.

Before opening a question, please consider checking:

- 📖 Project documentation
- 💬 GitHub Discussions
- 🔍 Existing Issues
- 📚 README and CONTRIBUTING guides

If your question is still unanswered, please complete the information below.

---

## Question

What would you like to know?

---

## Background

Provide any context that will help us answer your question.

Examples:

- What are you trying to accomplish?
- What benchmark or feature are you using?
- What have you already tried?

---

## Category

Select the category that best describes your question.

- [ ] Installation
- [ ] Getting Started
- [ ] Usage
- [ ] API
- [ ] Command Line Interface (CLI)
- [ ] Benchmarks
- [ ] Datasets
- [ ] Metrics
- [ ] Visualization
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Testing
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Continuous Integration
- [ ] Development
- [ ] Contributing
- [ ] Research / Scientific Methodology
- [ ] Other

---

```text
Version
```

### Python Version

```text
Python version
```

### Operating System

- [ ] Windows
- [ ] macOS
- [ ] Linux
- [ ] Other

Operating System Version:

---

## Relevant Code (Optional)

If applicable, include a minimal example.

```python
# Paste code here
```

---

## Error Messages (Optional)

If your question relates to an error, include the complete message.

```text
Paste error here.
```

---

## Documentation Consulted

Which resources have you already reviewed?

- [ ] README
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] Existing Issues
- [ ] GitHub Discussions
- [ ] API Documentation
- [ ] Other

---

## Additional Context

Include screenshots, logs, benchmark outputs, links, or any other information that may help us answer your question.

---

# Checklist

Please confirm the following before submitting.

- [ ] I searched existing issues.
- [ ] I reviewed the available documentation.
- [ ] I included sufficient context for my question.
- [ ] I included relevant version information.
- [ ] I removed any sensitive or confidential information.

---

Thank you for using **Circuit Bench**.

Thoughtful questions help improve the project, clarify documentation, and make Circuit Bench more accessible to the engineering, scientific computing, and research communities.
